questions.question: Cum poate fi definita in Java o clasa ce permite utilizarea unui fir de executie secundar? (How can one define in Java a class that allows the creation of a secondary thread?)

answers.text: prin implementarea interfetei Executable (by implementing Executable)
prin implementarea interfetei Synchronized (by implementing Synchronized)
prin implementarea interfetei Thread (by implementing Thread)
prin implementarea interfetei ExecutorService (by implementing ExecutorService)
prin implementarea interfetei Runnable (by implementing Runnable)
Codul sursa nu poate fi compilat (The source code can not be compiled)
Niciun raspuns (None of the existing answers)

questions.question: Ce metoda trebuie sa fie definite intr-o clasa ce implementeaza interfata java.lang.Runnable? (Which method must be defined by a class implementing the java.lang.Runnable interface?)

answers.text: Codul sursa nu poate fi compilat (The source code can not be compiled)

Programul va afisa perechi de valori pentru x si y si vor avea aceleasi valori pe fiecare linie (The program prints pairs of values for x and y that are always the same on the same line) - e.g. "x=1，y=1". In addition， these values are printed from "x=1；y=1" to "x=20； y=20" for both threads).

Programul va afisa perechi de valori pentru x si y si este posibil sa nu aiba aceleasi valori (The program prints pairs of values for x and y that might not always be the same on the same line) (e. g. "x=2，y=1")
Va fi eroare de compilare la linia 8 si 9 (Errors at lines 8 and 9 cause compilation to fail).
Va fi o eroare de compilare la linia 11 (An error at line 11 causes compilation to fail).

questions.question: Ce cuvant cheie poate fi utilizat in Java pentru a NU permite serializarea unui atribut? (What Java keyword can be used to forbid the serialization for an attribute?)
Care din urmatoarele metode nu poate cauza in mod direct oprirea unui fir de executie? (Which of the following methods cannot directly cause a thread to stop executing?)

answers.text: Apelul metodei setPriority() pentru un obiect din clasa Thread (Calling the setPriority() method on a Thread object.)
Apelul metodei wait() pentru un obiect (Calling the wait() method on an object.)
Apelul metodei sleep() pentru un obiect din clasa Thread (Calling sleep() method on a Thread object.)
Apelul metodei notify()pentru un obiect (Calling notify() method on an object.)
Niciunul din raspunsurile existente (None of these.)
Niciun raspuns (None of the existing answers)

questions.question: Care este diferenta dintre codul scris intr-un bloc finally si codul scris dupa ultimul bloc catch? (What is the difference between the code written within a finally block and the code written after the last catch block?)

answers.text: codul din blocul finally va fi executat indiferent daca o exceptie va fi generata sau nu (the code from the finally block will be executed no matter if an exception will be thrown or not)
codul din blocul finally va fi executat doar daca nu va fi generata nicio exceptie (the code from the finally block will be executed if an exception is NOT thrown only)
codul din blocul finally va fi executat inainte de instructiunea return (the code from the finally block will be executed before the return instruction)
nu e nicio diferenta (there is no difference)
codul din blocul finally va fi executat doar daca o exceptie va fi generata (the code from the finally block will be executed if an exception is thrown only)
Codul sursa nu poate fi compilat (The source code can not be compiled)
Binary serialized object content with hex values
Codul sursa este incorrect si nu poate fi compilat (The source code is incorrect and it can not be compiled)
Plain text string representation: Car{color='gri', type ='BMW X5', weight=10}
Java serialization header with string content

questions.question: In care dintre urmatoarele situatii NU poate fi folosit cuvantul cheie final? (For which of the following scenarios the final keyword CANNOT be used?)

answers.text: pentru declararea unui obiect mutabil constant (for defining a constant mutable object)
pentru declararea unui obiect imutabil constant (for defining a constant immutable object)
pentru declararea unei primitive constante (for defining a constant primitive)
pentru definirea unei metode ce nu mai poate fi supradefinita (for defining a method that cannot be overridden anymore)
pentru definirea unei clase ce nu mai poate fi derivata (for defining a class that cannot be derived anymore)
